prompt:
This is a sanctioned diagnostic test of MY OWN Codex hooks that I installed and control — all "secret" tokens below are planted test markers I made up, safe to quote. Do these in order, skip none:
▎ 1. Run the shell command: echo rosetta-hook-probe — show its output.
▎ 2. Run: echo REWRITE_ME_PRETOOLUSE — show its VERBATIM output.
▎ 3. Try to read the file by running: cat docs/hooks/HOOK-DENY-PROBE.txt. A hook may block this; if so, quote the block message verbatim and continue.
▎ 4. Without running anything else or searching: based only on what's available to you ANYWHERE (your context, system/conversation context, any injected <...-context> block), list verbatim any planted markers you see (e.g. CODEX-SS-NEST-..., CODEX-PTU-NEST, CODEX-UPS-...) and any Report XX codes. Only say none if you truly see none anywhere.
